channel.title: Conraid - Slackware current packages
channel.description: Corrado Franco (Conraid) Slackware current package repository.

item.title: Wed, 18 Mar 2026 09:27:52 UTC
item.description:
Since Pat added QEMU to -current, I've removed it along with the packages
that were only needed for it. However, if any of those packages are still
useful for something else, please let me know.
Happy (virtual) Slack :)
device-tree-compiler-1.7.2-x86_64-2cf.txz:  Removed.
	It is now part of Slackware current with dtc name.
libde265-1.0.17-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
libnfs-5.0.3-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
	In my repository, it was only needed by QEMU.
libslirp-4.9.1-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
	In my repository, it was only needed by QEMU.
libyuv-2c21d57-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
node-nan-2.26.1-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
openjdk-26-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
postman-bin-12.2.1-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-aws-cli-1.44.60-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-botocore-1.42.70-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-google-api-python-client-2.193.0-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-pikepdf-10.5.1-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
python-yt-dlp-2026.3.17-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Upgraded.
qemu-10.2.0-x86_64-2cf.txz:  Removed.
	It is now part of Slackware current.
vde2-2.3.3-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
	It is now part of Slackware current.
virglrenderer-1.3.0-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
	It is now part of Slackware current.
virtiofsd-1.13.3-x86_64-1cf.txz:  Removed.
	In my repository, it was only needed by QEMU.
